name: Document Intelligence
tagline: Trich xuat tri thuc tu tai lieu bang AI
description: Document Intelligence (Tri tue Tai lieu) la linh vuc ung dung AI de tu dong hieu, phan tich va trich xuat thong tin tu tai lieu — bao gom anh chup, ban scan, file PDF, va cac dinh dang van ban so khac. Linh vuc nay ket hop Computer Vision (xu ly anh), NLP (xu ly ngon ngu), va Multimodal AI (da phuong thuc) de xay dung pipeline tu dong: tien xu ly anh, nhan dang ky tu (OCR), phan tich bo cuc, trich xuat thong tin, va hieu tai lieu. Tai Viet Nam, Document Intelligence dac biet quan trong do he thong hanh chinh cong, ngan hang, bao hiem, logistics deu phu thuoc nang ne vao tai lieu giay, voi thach thuc rieng tu dau thanh dieu tieng Viet va cac loai giay to dac thu (CMND/CCCD, hoa don GTGT, so ho khau).
aliases: Xu ly Tai lieu Thong minh

core_concepts.name: OCR Pipeline (Quy trinh Nhan dang Ky tu Quang hoc)
core_concepts.definition: Chuoi cac buoc xu ly tu anh tai lieu den van ban so: tien xu ly anh -> phat hien vung van ban (text detection) -> nhan dang ky tu (text recognition) -> hau xu ly (spell correction, structure recovery). Day la nen tang cua moi he thong Document Intelligence.
core_concepts.formula_latex: P(Y | X) = \sum_{\pi \in B^{-1}(Y)} \prod_t p(\pi_t | X) \quad \text{(CTC Loss)}
core_concepts.significance: Moi du lieu van ban xu ly tiep (trich xuat, phan loai, Q&A) deu phu thuoc chat luong OCR. PaddleOCR dat ~85-92% chinh xac tieng Viet, vietocr dat ~90-95% cho text recognition.

core_concepts.name: Layout Analysis (Phan tich Bo cuc)
core_concepts.definition: Qua trinh xac dinh cau truc vat ly cua trang tai lieu — vi tri va loai cac thanh phan nhu tieu de, doan van, bang bieu, hinh anh, header, footer. Su dung object detection (DETR, Faster R-CNN) hoac DiT (Document Image Transformer).
core_concepts.significance: Khong co layout analysis, OCR chi tra ve mot dong van ban dai ma khong biet cau truc logic cua tai lieu. La buoc tien quyet de trich xuat thong tin co cau truc.

core_concepts.name: 2D Position Encoding (Ma hoa Vi tri 2 Chieu)
core_concepts.definition: Ky thuat ket hop vi tri khong gian 2D cua token tren trang tai lieu vao bieu dien (embedding). LayoutLM tien phong: embedding = token_embedding + 1D_position + 2D_spatial_embedding, voi 2D_spatial_embedding = emb(x_min) + emb(y_min) + emb(x_max) + emb(y_max) + emb(width) + emb(height).
core_concepts.significance: Dac diem rieng cua Document Intelligence so voi NLP thuan tuy: tai lieu co bo cuc 2 chieu. Thong tin 'token nay nam o dau tren trang' cuc ky quan trong de hieu cau truc tai lieu.

core_concepts.name: Document Understanding — Multimodal (Hieu Tai lieu Da phuong thuc)
core_concepts.definition: Kha nang hieu noi dung tai lieu bang cach ket hop dong thoi: van ban (text), bo cuc khong gian (layout/spatial), va hinh anh thi giac (visual). Mo hinh dai dien: LayoutLM (2020), LayoutLMv2 (2021), LayoutLMv3 (2022), UDOP (2023).
core_concepts.significance: Con nguoi doc tai lieu bang cach ket hop van ban, vi tri, va hinh thuc trinh bay. Mo hinh multimodal bat chuoc cach doc nay, dat SOTA tren FUNSD, CORD, DocVQA.

core_concepts.name: Table Structure Recognition (Nhan dang Cau truc Bang)
core_concepts.definition: Qua trinh phat hien bang trong tai lieu va xac dinh cau truc chi tiet: hang, cot, o, o tron (merged cells), tieu de. Su dung DETR-based Table Transformer hoac GNN.
core_concepts.significance: Bang bieu chua luong lon thong tin co cau truc trong bao cao tai chinh, hop dong, tai lieu ky thuat. Do chinh xac hien tai ~85% tren bang phuc tap.

core_concepts.name: Information Extraction (Trich xuat Thong tin — IE)
core_concepts.definition: Tu dong trich xuat thong tin co cau truc tu tai lieu phi cau truc: Key-Value Extraction (so hoa don, ngay, tong tien), Entity Extraction, Relation Extraction. Ket hop NER voi ngu canh khong gian 2D.
core_concepts.significance: Day la gia tri kinh doanh cot loi cua Document Intelligence — chuyen tai lieu phi cau truc thanh du lieu co cau truc de luu tru, phan tich, va tich hop vao ERP/CRM.

core_concepts.name: Handwriting Recognition (Nhan dang Chu viet tay — HWR)
core_concepts.definition: Nhan dang va chuyen doi chu viet tay thanh van ban so. Offline HWR (tu anh tinh) la dang pho bien. Thach thuc dac biet voi tieng Viet: dau thanh dieu rat nho, de bi nham; ky tu dac biet (a-breve, o-horn, u-horn, d-stroke).
core_concepts.significance: Nhieu tai lieu quan trong van duoc viet tay: don thuoc bac si, phieu ghi nhan, chu ky. Hien chua co giai phap HWR tieng Viet dat do chinh xac chap nhan duoc — day la co hoi nghien cuu lon.

core_concepts.name: Zero-shot Document Understanding (Hieu Tai lieu Khong can Huan luyen)
core_concepts.definition: Kha nang hieu va xu ly loai tai lieu moi ma khong can fine-tune tren du lieu cua loai tai lieu do. Vision LLMs (GPT-4V, Claude Vision) co kha nang nay thong qua prompt engineering.
core_concepts.significance: Giam chi phi trien khai — khong can thu thap va gan nhan du lieu cho moi loai tai lieu moi. Dac biet huu ich cho MVP va prototype. Chi phi: ~$0.01-0.05/trang.

core_concepts.name: Document Pre-processing (Tien xu ly Tai lieu)
core_concepts.definition: Cac ky thuat xu ly anh truoc OCR: Binarization (Otsu, Sauvola), De-skew (Hough Transform), De-noise (Gaussian blur, median filter), De-warp (DocUNet), Resolution Enhancement (Real-ESRGAN). Toi thieu 150 DPI, ly tuong 300 DPI.
core_concepts.significance: Garbage in, garbage out — chat luong anh dau vao anh huong truc tiep den do chinh xac toan bo pipeline. Pre-processing tot co the tang accuracy 5-15%.

core_concepts.name: Document Q&A (Hoi dap Tai lieu)
core_concepts.definition: He thong tra loi cau hoi dua tren noi dung tai lieu. Ba phuong phap: Extractive (tim doan tra loi tu tai lieu), Generative (LLM tao cau tra loi), Retrieval-Augmented (RAG — ket hop tim kiem va sinh).
core_concepts.significance: Cho phep tuong tac tu nhien voi tai lieu. Thay vi doc ca tai lieu dai, nguoi dung chi can hoi cau hoi cu the. Ket noi truc tiep voi B12 (Search & RAG).

algorithms.name: PaddleOCR
algorithms.complexity: Text detection O(H*W), recognition O(W/stride * T), toan bo <100ms/trang tren GPU
pros: Hieu suat tot cho tieng Viet va ngon ngu Chau A (8/10)
Mo hinh nhe — PP-OCRv4 mobile chi 4.4MB
Toan bo pipeline tu detection den table extraction
Ho tro 80+ ngon ngu, toi uu cho server va mobile/edge
cons: Phu thuoc PaddlePaddle framework (it pho bien hon PyTorch)
Tai lieu chinh bang tieng Trung, ban tieng Anh khong day du
Do chinh xac tieng Viet chua bang cac giai phap chuyen biet (vietocr)
use_cases: Production OCR pipeline cho moi loai tai lieu
Mobile/edge OCR cho ung dung di dong
Layout analysis va table detection
key_papers: Du, Y. et al. (2020). PP-OCR: A Practical Ultra Lightweight OCR System. arXiv:2009.09941

algorithms.name: LayoutLMv3
algorithms.complexity: O(n^2) attention tren so token; 125M-368M tham so
pros: SOTA tren nhieu benchmark: FUNSD, CORD, SROIE, RVL-CDIP, DocVQA
Unified multimodal pre-training: text + 2D position + image patches
Transfer learning tot qua pre-training tren du lieu lon
Ho tro da ngon ngu qua LayoutXLM
cons: Van can OCR truoc (khong phai end-to-end)
Mo hinh lon, can GPU de inference
Pre-training ton kem (nhieu ngay tren nhieu GPU)
use_cases: Form understanding va information extraction (production)
Document classification
Document VQA
key_papers: Huang, Y. et al. (2022). LayoutLMv3: Pre-training for Document AI with Unified Text and Image Masking. ACM MM 2022. arXiv:2204.08387

algorithms.name: Donut (OCR-free Document Understanding Transformer)
algorithms.complexity: O(n^2) attention; Swin Transformer encoder + BART decoder
pros: Khong can OCR engine rieng — don gian hoa pipeline
Khong bi anh huong boi loi OCR
Linh hoat: fine-tune cho nhieu tac vu (IE, classification, VQA)
SynthDoG pre-training ho tro tieng Viet
cons: Can nhieu du lieu huan luyen tong hop
Do chinh xac van ban chua bang OCR chuyen dung tren mot so truong hop
Xu ly tai lieu nhieu trang con han che
use_cases: Receipt/invoice parsing khong can OCR
Document classification tu anh
Rapid prototyping cho loai tai lieu moi
key_papers: Kim, G. et al. (2022). OCR-free Document Understanding Transformer. ECCV 2022. arXiv:2111.15664

algorithms.name: Tesseract OCR
algorithms.complexity: O(n) voi n la so pixel, thuc te phu thuoc kich thuoc anh
pros: Ma nguon mo, mien phi hoan toan
Ho tro 100+ ngon ngu bao gom tieng Viet
Cong dong lon, tai lieu phong phu
Co the fine-tune cho font/ngon ngu cu the
cons: Chat luong thap tren anh nhieu, nghieng, tai lieu phuc tap
Khong co layout analysis tot
Cham hon cac giai phap hien dai
use_cases: Prototype nhanh (cai dat don gian nhat)
OCR co ban cho tai lieu chat luong cao
Baseline benchmark
key_papers: Smith, R. (2007). An Overview of the Tesseract OCR Engine. ICDAR 2007.

algorithms.name: vietocr
pros: Do chinh xac dau thanh dieu tieng Viet cao nhat (9/10)
Transformer-based seq2seq, huan luyen rieng cho tieng Viet
Mo hinh nhe, chay duoc tren CPU
cons: Chi lam text recognition (khong co text detection)
Cong dong nho, it tai lieu
Can ket hop voi text detector rieng (CRAFT/DBNet)
use_cases: Text recognition tieng Viet khi can do chinh xac dau cao nhat
Ket hop voi PaddleOCR text detection
Fine-tune cho tai lieu dac thu tieng Viet
key_papers: pbcquoc/vietocr (2020). Vietnamese OCR using Transformer. GitHub.

algorithms.name: DiT (Document Image Transformer)
algorithms.category: Pre-trained Vision Model cho tai lieu
algorithms.complexity: ViT backbone, masked image modeling tren 42M anh tai lieu
pros: Hieu qua cao cho layout analysis va document classification
Khong can OCR — lam viec truc tiep tren anh
SOTA tren PubLayNet va RVL-CDIP tai thoi diem ra mat
cons: Chi su dung thong tin thi giac (khong co van ban)
Can fine-tune cho tac vu cu the
use_cases: Document layout analysis
Document image classification
Page segmentation
key_papers: Li, J. et al. (2022). DiT: Self-supervised Pre-training for Document Image Transformer. AAAI 2022. arXiv:2203.02378

algorithms.name: Table Transformer (DETR-based)
algorithms.complexity: ResNet backbone + Transformer encoder-decoder voi object queries
pros: Xu ly tot merged cells va bang phuc tap
DETR architecture khong can NMS va anchor boxes
Huan luyen tren PubTables-1M (1 trieu bang)
cons: Kem hon tren bang khong co duong ke (borderless tables)
Can nhieu bo nho cho anh co do phan giai cao
Chua toi uu cho bang tieng Viet dac thu
use_cases: Trich xuat bang tu bao cao tai chinh
Xu ly bang trong hop dong va tai lieu ky thuat
Table detection trong document pipeline
key_papers: Smock, B. et al. (2022). PubTables-1M: Towards comprehensive table extraction from unstructured documents. CVPR 2022. arXiv:2110.00061

algorithms.name: Vision LLM (Claude Vision, GPT-4V)
pros: Zero-shot: xu ly bat ky loai tai lieu nao khong can fine-tune
Do chinh xac cao cho tai lieu phuc tap, da dang
Khong can GPU local, khong can pipeline setup
Structured output (JSON) truc tiep
cons: Chi phi token-based tang nhanh khi scale
Khong dap ung yeu cau privacy/on-premise
Latency cao (2-5s/trang) so voi pipeline local
Khong the fine-tune cho domain cu the
use_cases: MVP/Prototype validation nhanh
Xu ly tai lieu kho ma pipeline truyen thong that bai
Fallback trong hybrid pipeline (~20% tai lieu)
key_papers: OpenAI (2023). GPT-4V(ision) System Card. Technical Report.
Anthropic (2024). Claude 3 Model Card. Technical Report.

algorithms.name: GNN cho Document Understanding
pros: Mo hinh hoa tu nhien quan he khong gian giua cac thanh phan tai lieu
Hieu qua cho form understanding va key-value extraction
Xu ly tot tai lieu co cau truc phuc tap
cons: Can xay dung do thi tu ket qua OCR (them mot buoc)
It thu vien san co so voi Transformer-based approaches
Kho scale cho tai lieu lon
use_cases: Form understanding voi quan he khong gian phuc tap
Invoice key-value pair extraction
Document structure analysis
key_papers: Liu, X. et al. (2019). Graph Convolution for Multimodal Information Extraction from Visually Rich Documents. NAACL 2019.

sota_2024_2026.summary: 2024-2026 la giai doan Vision LLM cach mang hoa Document Intelligence. GPT-4V, Claude Vision, Gemini co the doc va hieu bat ky tai lieu nao theo kieu zero-shot. Dong thoi, cac mo hinh OCR-free (Donut, GOT, Nougat) ngay cang manh, loai bo hoan toan buoc OCR. LayoutLMv3 va UDOP van la lua chon hang dau cho production on-premise. Xu huong chinh: hybrid pipeline ket hop mo hinh local (re, nhanh) voi VLM (chinh xac, linh hoat) de toi uu ca chi phi va chat luong.

key_models.name: LayoutLMv3
key_models.innovation: Unified multimodal pre-training voi MLM + MIM + WPA

key_models.name: Donut
key_models.innovation: OCR-free end-to-end voi Swin + BART, SynthDoG pre-training

key_models.name: DiT
key_models.innovation: BEiT-style masked image modeling tren 42M anh tai lieu

key_models.name: UDOP
key_models.innovation: Unified Document Processing — mot mo hinh cho nhieu tac vu

key_models.name: GOT (General OCR Theory)
key_models.innovation: OCR 2.0 — end-to-end doc moi loai van ban, cong thuc, nhac, bieu do

ongoing_debates: Pipeline truyen thong vs OCR-free end-to-end: pipeline van chinh xac hon cho tieng Viet, nhung OCR-free dang bat kip nhanh
Cloud VLM vs Local models: VLM tot hon cho zero-shot nhung khong dap ung privacy; can hybrid
Fine-tuned vs Foundation models: fine-tuned van thang tren domain cu the, nhung VLMs cho phep trien khai nhanh hon nhieu

key_papers.title: LayoutLMv3: Pre-training for Document AI with Unified Text and Image Masking
key_papers.authors: Huang, Y., Lv, T., Cui, L., Lu, Y., Wei, F.
key_papers.contribution: Tien phong unified multimodal pre-training cho Document AI, ket hop text + 2D position + image patches. Dat SOTA tren FUNSD, CORD, SROIE, RVL-CDIP, DocVQA. La lua chon hang dau cho production document understanding.

key_papers.title: OCR-free Document Understanding Transformer (Donut)
key_papers.authors: Kim, G., Hong, T., Yim, M., et al. (Clova AI)
key_papers.contribution: Loai bo hoan toan buoc OCR — doc truc tiep tu anh tai lieu va sinh output co cau truc. Su dung SynthDoG de tao du lieu tong hop da ngon ngu (bao gom tieng Viet). Mo ra xu huong OCR-free.

key_papers.title: DiT: Self-supervised Pre-training for Document Image Transformer
key_papers.authors: Li, J., Xu, Y., Lv, T., Cui, L., Zhang, C., Wei, F.
key_papers.contribution: Ap dung BEiT masked image modeling vao linh vuc tai lieu voi 42M anh. SOTA tren PubLayNet (layout analysis) va RVL-CDIP (classification). Cung cap backbone manh cho document vision tasks.

key_papers.title: PubTables-1M: Towards Comprehensive Table Extraction from Unstructured Documents
key_papers.authors: Smock, B., Pesala, R., Abraham, R.
key_papers.contribution: Dataset 1 trieu bang tu bai bao khoa hoc va DETR-based Table Transformer. Giai quyet van de table detection va structure recognition tren quy mo lon.

key_papers.title: XFUND: A Benchmark Dataset for Multilingual Visually Rich Form Understanding
key_papers.authors: Xu, Y., Lv, T., Cui, L., et al.
key_papers.contribution: Benchmark da ngon ngu (7 ngon ngu bao gom tieng Viet) cho form understanding. La benchmark cong khai duy nhat co du lieu form tieng Viet, du chi ~200 mau.

key_papers.title: PP-OCR: A Practical Ultra Lightweight OCR System
key_papers.authors: Du, Y., Li, C., Guo, R., et al. (Baidu)
key_papers.contribution: He thong OCR sieu nhe cho production: text detection (DBNet++) + recognition (SVTR) + direction classifier. PP-OCRv4 mobile chi 4.4MB, ho tro 80+ ngon ngu. La OCR engine ma nguon mo pho bien nhat cho tieng Chau A.

key_papers.title: Unifying Vision, Text, and Layout for Universal Document Processing (UDOP)
key_papers.authors: Tang, Z., Yang, Z., Wang, G., et al.
key_papers.contribution: Mot mo hinh duy nhat cho nhieu tac vu Document AI (classification, IE, VQA, layout analysis). Thong nhat vision + text + layout trong mot kien truc encoder-decoder.

key_papers.title: LayoutXLM: Multimodal Pre-training for Multilingual Visually-rich Document Understanding
key_papers.authors: Xu, Y., Lv, T., Cui, L., et al.
key_papers.contribution: Mo rong LayoutLMv2 cho da ngon ngu, huan luyen tren 30 trieu trang tai lieu tu 53 ngon ngu. La giai phap tot nhat cho document understanding da ngon ngu bao gom tieng Viet.

file_storage.rationale: Ma nguon mo, tu host, tuong thich S3 API, luu tru anh va PDF goc

database.rationale: Luu tru metadata tai lieu, ket qua trich xuat, audit log. JSONB cho du lieu phi cau truc

search.rationale: Full-text search tren van ban trich xuat, faceted search theo loai tai lieu, ngay, nguon

queue.rationale: Task queue cho xu ly tai lieu bat dong bo, retry, priority queue

ocr_engine.rationale: Diem tong hop 8.15/10, tot nhat cho tieng Viet va ngon ngu Chau A, production-ready

document_understanding.rationale: SOTA tren nhieu benchmark, multimodal (text + layout + image), fine-tune duoc

layout_analysis.rationale: DiT cho layout detection, PP-Structure cho table structure recognition

vlm_fallback.rationale: Zero-shot chinh xac cao nhat, structured output, ho tro tieng Viet tot

api_framework.rationale: Async, auto-generated docs, type hints, nhanh nhat cho Python APIs

model_serving.rationale: Multi-model serving, GPU sharing, dynamic batching, model versioning

ml_ops.rationale: MLflow cho experiment tracking va model registry; Label Studio cho annotation

orchestration.rationale: Batch retraining pipelines, data pipeline DAGs, scheduling

containerisation.rationale: GPU pod scheduling, auto-scaling, multi-model deployment

monitoring.rationale: SLA metrics (latency, throughput), ML-specific drift detection, accuracy monitoring

feasibility_score.summary: Document Intelligence co tiem nang ung dung thuc te lon nhat tai Viet Nam. Cong nghe da truong thanh (OCR, LayoutLM, VLMs), nhu cau thi truong rat cao ($30-50 trieu USD). Thach thuc chinh: thieu du lieu huan luyen tieng Viet, dau thanh dieu, yeu cau privacy. Co the trien khai thanh cong voi dieu kien tap trung vao nich cu the (hoa don, CCCD) va dau tu du lieu.

technical_feasibility.notes: Cong nghe truong thanh: PaddleOCR, LayoutLMv3, Vision LLMs deu production-ready. Tru diem: OCR tieng Viet chua dat do chinh xac tuong duong tieng Anh; HWR tieng Viet chua co giai phap.

market_demand.notes: Nhu cau cuc lon: ngan hang (eKYC bat buoc), hanh chinh cong (chuyen doi so quoc gia), logistics (xuat nhap khau). Chinh sach ho tro: ND 123/2020, TT 16/2020, De an 06.

data_availability.notes: Diem yeu lon nhat. XFUND-VI chi ~200 mau. Thieu dataset OCR, form, table, HWR tieng Viet lon. Can tu thu thap, synthetic data, active learning.

implementation_risk.notes: Rui ro trung binh: dau thanh dieu sai gay sai nghia; tai lieu cu chat luong thap; privacy nghiem ngat (ngan hang, y te).

competitive_landscape.notes: Doi thu manh: FPT.AI (lon nhat), VinAI (nghien cuu), Cinnamon (Nhat-Viet). Co hoi: cac nich chua duoc phuc vu tot (chung tu logistics, don thuoc).

key_risks: Do chinh xac OCR/IE tieng Viet khong dat >90% cho production (xac suat 70%)
Chi phi VLM API tang khong kiem soat khi scale (xac suat 50%)
Lo lot du lieu PII tu tai lieu nhay cam (xac suat 30%, tac dong rat cao)
Doi thu (FPT.AI, VinAI) ra san pham tot hon truoc (xac suat 50%)
Thieu du lieu huan luyen tieng Viet chat luong cao (xac suat 60%)
go_conditions: Dieu kien 1: Tap trung vao 1-2 nich cu the (hoa don + CCCD), khong lam rong
Dieu kien 2: Dau tu thu thap >5,000 anh/loai tai lieu de fine-tune
Dieu kien 3: Su dung hybrid pipeline (local OCR + VLM fallback) de giam rui ro
Dieu kien 4: Co ke hoach HITL (human-in-the-loop) cho giai doan dau

industry_applications.industry: I02 — Finance & Banking (Tai chinh & Ngan hang)
use_cases: eKYC: Xac thuc CMND/CCCD cho mo tai khoan online (bat buoc theo TT 16/2020)
Xu ly uy nhiem chi, phieu chuyen tien: hang trieu giao dich/ngay
Phe duyet tin dung: doc va phan tich bao cao tai chinh, giay to dam bao
KYB (Know Your Business): Xac minh giay phep kinh doanh
Hoa don dien tu: xu ly va doi soat tu dong
industry_applications.target_accuracy: OCR >95% cho CCCD; IE >92% cho hoa don
industry_applications.special_considerations: Yeu cau on-premise bat buoc. Tuan thu TT 16/2020. Dau thanh dieu tieng Viet tren ten nguoi la thach thuc lon.

industry_applications.industry: I06 — Logistics & Supply Chain (Logistics & Chuoi cung ung)
use_cases: To khai hai quan: doc va trich xuat tu dong
Bill of Lading (Van don): trich xuat thong tin hang hoa, nguoi gui, nguoi nhan
Certificate of Origin (C/O): xac minh xuat xu hang hoa
Packing list: trich xuat danh sach hang hoa, so luong, trong luong
Delivery order: xu ly lenh giao hang tu dong
industry_applications.target_accuracy: IE >90% cho cac truong chinh; >85% cho bang hang hoa
industry_applications.special_considerations: Tai lieu da ngon ngu (Viet, Anh, Trung). Nhieu dinh dang khac nhau theo hang tau va cang. Can xu ly nhanh de khong lam cham thong quan.

use_cases: Ho so boi thuong suc khoe: don thuoc + hoa don vien phi + giay ra vien
Hop dong bao hiem: trich xuat dieu khoan, quyen loi, loai tru
Xac minh tai lieu: phat hien giay to gia mao
Tu dong hoa xet duyet boi thuong
industry_applications.target_accuracy: IE >88% cho truong thong tin chinh; phat hien gia mao >80%
industry_applications.special_considerations: Don thuoc bac si viet tay — thach thuc HWR lon nhat. Can do bao mat cao cho thong tin suc khoe.

industry_applications.industry: I08 — Government & Public Services (Hanh chinh cong)
use_cases: Dich vu cong truc tuyen muc do 4: so hoa va xu ly giay to cong dan
Chuyen doi so tai lieu hanh chinh: so ho khau -> du lieu dien tu
Luu tru quoc gia: so hoa tai lieu lich su
Xac thuc giay to: giay khai sinh, giay dang ky ket hon
industry_applications.special_considerations: Tai lieu da the he (truoc 1975, 1975-2000, hien dai). Can tuan thu Luat An ninh Mang VN. Yeu cau luu tru du lieu tai Viet Nam.

cross_domain_connections.description: Document Intelligence su dung cac ky thuat Computer Vision lam nen tang: CNN cho OCR, object detection (DETR, Faster R-CNN) cho layout analysis, image preprocessing (de-skew, de-noise, binarization). Khong co Computer Vision, khong co Document Intelligence.

NLP xu ly van ban sau khi trich xuat tu tai lieu: Named Entity Recognition, Relation Extraction, Text Classification, Summarization. PhoBERT cho NLP tieng Viet la bo sung quan trong cho Document Intelligence pipeline.

Document Intelligence trich xuat van ban va thong tin tu tai lieu; Search & RAG (B12) to chuc, luu tru, va tim kiem thong tin do. Ket hop tao he thong hoi dap tai lieu (Document Q&A) voi retrieval-augmented generation.
Conversational AI (B08) su dung Document Intelligence de doc va hieu tai lieu trong cac cuoc hoi thoai. Vi du: chatbot doc hop dong va tra loi cau hoi cua khach hang ve dieu khoan.

mvp.scope: 1 loai tai lieu (hoa don), PaddleOCR + LayoutLMv3 fine-tuned, FastAPI endpoint, validation UI
mvp.notes: Phu thuoc vao toc do thu thap du lieu huan luyen. 6 tuan neu co san ~500 anh hoa don gan nhan.

production_v1.scope: 2 loai tai lieu (hoa don + CCCD), hybrid pipeline (OCR + VLM), HITL, monitoring, on-premise, >5K anh/loai
production_v1.notes: Bao gom thoi gian thu thap va gan nhan du lieu. Can pilot voi 2-3 khach hang.

full_platform.scope: 10+ loai tai lieu, multi-tenant SaaS, Document Q&A, HWR, forensics, self-service onboarding
full_platform.team: 3 ML + 3 backend + 2 MLOps + 2 frontend + 1 QA + 1 PM
full_platform.notes: Can strict feature freeze sau thang 8. GPU cost model phai duoc validate truoc khi commit infrastructure.

risks.name: Do chinh xac OCR/IE khong du cho production
risks.description: OCR va IE tren tai lieu tieng Viet thuc te khong dat accuracy yeu cau (>90%), dac biet voi dau thanh dieu va tai lieu chat luong thap. Xac suat 70%.
risks.mitigation: Thu thap >5,000 anh/loai de fine-tune. Hybrid pipeline voi VLM fallback. HITL cho giai doan dau. Fine-tune vietocr cho text recognition tieng Viet.

risks.name: Bao mat va Privacy — lo lot PII
risks.description: Lo lot du lieu tai lieu nhay cam (CMND, thong tin tai chinh, ho so benh an). Vi pham Luat An ninh Mang VN. Xac suat 30% nhung tac dong huy diet.
risks.mitigation: On-premise deployment. Encryption at rest va in transit. PII masking tu dong. Access control va audit logging. Tuan thu Luat An ninh Mang VN.

risks.name: Chi phi VLM API khong kiem soat
risks.description: Khi scale, chi phi VLM API tang nhanh: 100,000 trang/thang = $1,000-5,000. An mon loi nhuan.
risks.mitigation: Hybrid pipeline (80% local, 20% VLM). Budget limits hang ngay/thang. Cache ket qua. Dan chuyen sang mo hinh local khi du du lieu.

risks.name: Thieu du lieu huan luyen tieng Viet
risks.description: Chi co XFUND-VI (~200 mau). Thieu dataset OCR, form, table, HWR tieng Viet lon. Lam cham tien do va giam chat luong.
risks.mitigation: Synthetic data (SynthDoG). Active learning qua HITL. Partnership voi doanh nghiep. Data augmentation.

risks.name: Doi thu canh tranh vuot mat
risks.description: FPT.AI, VinAI, Cinnamon ra san pham tot hon, gia re hon truoc khi hoan thien.
risks.mitigation: Tap trung nich chuyen sau. Speed-to-market. Khac biet hoa bang trai nghiem khach hang. Open-source component de xay community.

overview.description: Document Intelligence (Tri tue Tai lieu) la linh vuc AI tu dong hieu, phan tich va trich xuat thong tin tu tai lieu. Ket hop Computer Vision, NLP, va Multimodal AI de xay dung pipeline: tien xu ly -> OCR -> layout analysis -> information extraction -> validation. Tai Viet Nam, nhu cau rat cao ($30-50 trieu USD) tu ngan hang, hanh chinh cong, logistics, bao hiem.
keyQuestions: Lam the nao de dat do chinh xac OCR >90% cho tieng Viet voi dau thanh dieu?
Nen dung pipeline truyen thong (PaddleOCR + LayoutLMv3) hay Vision LLM (Claude/GPT-4V)?
Lam sao thu thap du lieu huan luyen tieng Viet khi chua co dataset cong khai lon?
Lam the nao can bang giua chi phi VLM API va do chinh xac?
Cach trien khai on-premise cho khach hang yeu cau bao mat cao (ngan hang, chinh phu)?
whenToUse: Can tu dong hoa xu ly tai lieu giay voi so luong lon (>100 tai lieu/ngay)
eKYC: xac thuc giay to tuy than tu dong
Trich xuat thong tin tu hoa don, hop dong, chung tu de nhap vao he thong
So hoa tai lieu cu de luu tru va tim kiem
Xay dung he thong hoi dap tai lieu (Document Q&A)
whenNotToUse: Tai lieu da o dinh dang so co cau truc (XML, JSON) — khong can OCR
So luong tai lieu qua it (<10/ngay) — nhap lieu thu cong re hon
Yeu cau do chinh xac 100% tuyet doi — AI chua dat duoc, can HITL
Tai lieu hoan toan la chu viet tay tieng Viet — HWR chua san sang
Khong co ngan sach cho GPU hoac API costs

data_sources: R-MLE, R-DE, R-DA, R-BE, R-DO, R-QA, R-SA, R-FE, R-D02 Practitioner Notes — B02 — 2026-03-31
